description: Cut grass to target height across maintained turf areas. Includes edging along paths and beds.
weather_constraints: {"skip_if": [{"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.4, "reason": "Soil waterlogged \u2014 mowing causes compaction and ruts"}, {"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.3, "reason": "Significant rainfall today \u2014 ground too wet and clippings will clump"}, {"field": "soil_temperature_0cm", "operator": "lt", "value": 35.0, "reason": "Soil temperature below 35\u00b0F \u2014 grass growth dormant, mowing unnecessary"}], "skip_if_recent": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.25, "lookback_hours": 24, "reason": "Heavy rain in past 24 hours \u2014 soil still too wet for mower traffic"}], "defer_if_upcoming": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.3, "lookahead_hours": 24, "reason": "Rain forecast within 24 hours \u2014 defer to avoid cutting wet grass"}], "require": [{"field": "evapotranspiration", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.01, "reason": "ET0 near zero \u2014 grass not actively growing, mowing not productive"}]}

description: Apply supplemental water to turf and planted beds via sprinkler or drip systems.
weather_constraints: {"skip_if": [{"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.35, "reason": "Soil already adequately moist \u2014 irrigation would waste water and risk overwatering"}, {"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.2, "reason": "Sufficient rainfall today \u2014 skip irrigation"}, {"field": "soil_temperature_0cm", "operator": "lt", "value": 34.0, "reason": "Soil temperature near freezing \u2014 irrigation risks ice formation and root damage"}], "skip_if_recent": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.2, "lookback_hours": 24, "reason": "Adequate rain in past 24 hours \u2014 soil moisture replenished"}], "defer_if_upcoming": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.2, "lookahead_hours": 24, "reason": "Rain forecast tomorrow \u2014 defer irrigation to avoid oversaturation"}], "require": [{"field": "evapotranspiration", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.05, "reason": "ET0 too low \u2014 plants are not under moisture stress, irrigation not needed"}, {"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "lt", "value": 0.35, "reason": "Soil moisture adequate \u2014 no irrigation deficit to address"}]}

description: Apply granular or liquid fertiliser to turf and planted areas per seasonal schedule.
weather_constraints: {"skip_if": [{"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.45, "reason": "Saturated soil \u2014 fertiliser will leach below root zone before absorption"}, {"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.2, "reason": "Active rainfall \u2014 fertiliser will wash off before uptake"}, {"field": "soil_temperature_0cm", "operator": "lt", "value": 50.0, "reason": "Soil temperature below 50\u00b0F \u2014 biological activity too slow for fertiliser uptake"}], "skip_if_recent": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.3, "lookback_hours": 12, "reason": "Heavy rain in past 12 hours \u2014 soil structure disrupted, fertiliser will leach"}], "defer_if_upcoming": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.15, "lookahead_hours": 48, "reason": "Rain forecast within 48 hours \u2014 fertiliser will wash off before uptake"}], "require": [{"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.1, "reason": "Soil too dry for fertiliser activation \u2014 light moisture needed for dissolution"}, {"field": "evapotranspiration", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.03, "reason": "ET0 too low \u2014 plant uptake insufficient to absorb applied nutrients"}]}

description: Install seasonal annuals, bedding plants, plugs, or bulbs in designated display beds.
weather_constraints: {"skip_if": [{"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.42, "reason": "Waterlogged soil \u2014 roots will rot and transplants will heave"}, {"field": "soil_temperature_0cm", "operator": "lt", "value": 41.0, "reason": "Soil temperature below 41\u00b0F \u2014 transplant shock risk very high"}, {"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.25, "reason": "Active rainfall \u2014 transplants cannot be handled or settled in wet conditions"}], "skip_if_recent": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.5, "lookback_hours": 24, "reason": "Heavy rain yesterday \u2014 soil structure disrupted and beds poorly drained"}], "defer_if_upcoming": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.4, "lookahead_hours": 24, "reason": "Heavy rain forecast tomorrow \u2014 new transplants risk wash-out and crown rot"}, {"field": "soil_temperature_0cm", "operator": "lt", "value": 41.0, "lookahead_hours": 48, "reason": "Cold soil forecast within 48 hours \u2014 delay planting until soil warms"}], "require": [{"field": "evapotranspiration", "operator": "lte", "value": 0.25, "reason": "Very high ET0 \u2014 transplant water stress risk too high without irrigation infrastructure"}, {"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "gte", "value": 0.08, "reason": "Soil too dry \u2014 transplants need moist soil to establish root contact"}]}

description: Cut back shrubs, ornamental grasses, and small trees for shape, health, and clearance.
weather_constraints: {"skip_if": [{"field": "soil_moisture_0_to_1cm", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.45, "reason": "Ground too soft \u2014 staff and equipment will damage turf when moving between shrubs"}, {"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.1, "reason": "Active rainfall \u2014 wet conditions spread fungal spores through open pruning wounds"}, {"field": "soil_temperature_0cm", "operator": "lt", "value": 32.0, "reason": "Soil at or below freezing \u2014 ground too hard for safe stake and equipment movement"}], "skip_if_recent": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.2, "lookback_hours": 6, "reason": "Rain in past 6 hours \u2014 plant surfaces still wet, disease transmission risk elevated"}], "defer_if_upcoming": [{"field": "precipitation", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.15, "lookahead_hours": 24, "reason": "Rain tomorrow increases disease risk through open pruning wounds \u2014 wait for dry period"}, {"field": "evapotranspiration", "operator": "gt", "value": 0.3, "lookahead_hours": 24, "reason": "High ET0 forecast \u2014 freshly pruned plants will experience severe water stress"}], "require": [{"field": "soil_temperature_0cm", "operator": "gte", "value": 32.0, "reason": "Frost conditions \u2014 fresh cuts are vulnerable to frost damage, defer until frost-free"}, {"field": "evapotranspiration", "operator": "lte", "value": 0.3, "reason": "Very high ET0 \u2014 pruning during drought stress causes disproportionate damage"}]}
